en: Be right up to the mark! Be right up to the mark!
He's taken your mark! He's taken your mark!
ko: 그가 네 자리를 차지했어! 그가 네 자리를 차지했어!

en: Can't be stopped though, he's taken your mark!
ko: 멈출 수 없어, 그는 네 자리를 차지했어!

en: He's defamatory, he's been brought up with it,.
And I think Brian's a sex offender!
If I'm there they should know that,.
We all fall hard in the lead,.
They can't get far behind us!
ko: 그들은 우리 뒤로 멀리 가지 못해!

en: Take your red pistol for good fun,
Take your red pistol for good fun!
